field.label: Code
field.help: DHCPv4 option to offer to the client.

field.label: Encoding
field.help: Choose between auto converting the option data to binary, or providing binary data yourself. For encapsulated and other complex options, constructing your own binary payload can be a requirement.

field.label: Data
field.help: Payload to send to a client.

field.label: Force
field.help: Always send the option, also when the client does not ask for it in the parameter request list.

field.label: Description
field.help: You may enter a description here for your reference.
